$agent_instructions.primary_use: 搜索海外华人生活经验（租房、餐厅、求职面试）
$agent_instructions.data_format: Markdown files with YAML frontmatter in data/{category}/ directories
query_by: any structured field in YAML frontmatter
$agent_instructions.freshness: posts older than 1 year may be outdated
$agent_instructions.limitations: data is self-reported by community members, not officially verified
how_to_use: Each .md file in data/{category}/ is one review
YAML frontmatter contains structured, queryable fields
Markdown body contains narrative context for semantic understanding
Use frontmatter fields for precise filtering (city, rating, price, etc.)
Use markdown body for context when structured fields are insufficient
Fields with 'intent' describe what the data means for decision-making

signal_support.description: OpenBook supports real-time Signals — atomic observations that complement Reviews
signal_support.freshness_rule: Signals older than 30 days have reduced reliability. Always check date.
signal_support.relationship_to_reviews: Signals update and supplement Reviews. A Review is a snapshot; Signals track changes over time.
